Prompt
U
Oracle Events
1. Search Elena's recent emails using search_emails with query related to "Elena" or sender/recipient "elena.rostova@moveops.com" to find inbound messages she hasn't responded to and outbound directives she issued before going offline. Key discoveries: emails from Marcus about DOT compliance and vendor disputes, emails from David and Samira about the ExpenseBot pilot, the Vectral renewal counter-proposal thread, the Terraform onboarding thread, and Elena's own directive emails.
2. Search Slack for messages mentioning or directed at Elena using conversations_search_messages with search_query related to "Elena" or "@Elena" across all channels. Key discoveries: David's urgent NorthWind escalation in #executive (Pam Kowalski's final warning, PathFinder competitor threat), David's Terraform AM capacity crisis and reply-all disaster in #executive, Chloe/David's BrightLoop temp coordinator hire request in #executive (Elena never responded), Elena's approved Vectral counter-strategy (10% discount, hold firm), Marcus's vendor strategy memo assignment.
3. Search Slack #executive channel (C004) using conversations_history to get the full thread of recent executive-level discussions. Key discovery: multiple threads where department heads tagged Elena and received no response -- BrightLoop coordinator hire request, vendor strategy memo deadline, NorthWind churn escalation.
4. Search Slack #customer-engagement channel (C002) using conversations_history or conversations_search_messages with search_query related to "Vectral" or "NorthWind" or "renewal" to find current status of client threads. Key discoveries: Mina's Vectral counter-offer delivery and Rachel's 12% counter-proposal, David telling Mina to hold firm at 10%, board met April 23 -- no response received.
5. Search Slack #operations channel (C006) using conversations_search_messages with search_query related to "BrightLoop" or "coordinator" or "capacity" to find the unanswered coordinator hire request. Key discovery: Chloe flagged coordinator capacity at breaking point, requested temp hire authorization from Elena -- no response.
6. Search Slack #finance channel (C005) using conversations_search_messages with search_query related to "vendor" or "Heartland" or "Swift" or "rate" to find the vendor consolidation crisis and Marcus's memo status. Key discoveries: Heartland 20% Q3 rate increase tied to unresolved dispute, Swift 15% rate increase plus $500 DOT documentation surcharge per shipment, Alejandro mapping vendor cost exposure across active client contracts, Elena ordered Marcus to deliver a formal vendor strategy memo by Wednesday.
7. Search CRM for Vectral deal using crm_search_deals with dealname related to "Vectral" or "renewal." Key discovery: deal_vectral_q3_renewal_risk with dealstage "at_risk", churn threat opened April 18, Rachel's 15% demand, MoveOps counter at 10% with Preferred Partner framing, board met April 23 -- no response recorded.
8. Search CRM for NorthWind deals using crm_search_deals (with dealname related to "NorthWind") or crm_search_companies (with name "NorthWind"). Key discovery: deal_northwind_denver_expansion_v2 at "contractSent" stage with description of chain-of-custody breach and piano damage. The PathFinder Logistics competitor threat surfaces in Pam Kowalski's email and Slack #executive discussions, not in the CRM deal data itself.
9. Search emails for NorthWind-related communications using search_emails with query related to "NorthWind" or "Pam Kowalski" to find the full scope of the churn crisis. Key discoveries: Victor Huang's security breach report about chain-of-custody violation, Pam's final warning to David mentioning PathFinder, Catalina's broken recovery promise.
10. Search emails for vendor-related communications using search_emails with query related to "Heartland" or "Swift" or "vendor" or "rate increase" to determine whether Marcus's vendor strategy memo was completed and delivered. Key discovery: Marcus inherited the memo assignment from Elena but delivery status is unclear.
11. Search Airtable Client Accounts table (tblClientAccts01) using airtable_search_records or airtable_list_records with base_id appMoveOpsOps001 to review current account statuses and notes. Stale records found: (a) Mosaic Robotics (recAcct000000006): Status reads "Onboarding" (should be "Active"), Total Relocations reads 3 (actual 7), Notes still reference "First relocation in progress (Washington)" and "Newest client (2 months)" -- both outdated; the 4/15 update added prototype damage context but left Status and count stale. (b) NorthWind Technologies (recAcct000000064): Total Relocations reads 5 (actual 7 with Denver expansion adding Raj Patel and Emilia Cruz), Notes omit the churn crisis, Pam's final warning, and PathFinder competitor threat. (c) BrightLoop Analytics (recAcct000000005): Total Relocations reads 3 (actual 6), Notes say "First relocation in progress (Ekwueme)" -- Ekwueme is completed, Series B expansion underway. (d) StormCloud Analytics (recAcct000000063): Total Relocations reads 3 (actual 4 with Jae-won Kim), Notes reference a Feb 24 flight complaint but omit the CFO Liam Park escalation and multi-failure chain.
12. Look up contact details for people who need messages from Priya using contacts_search_contacts or contacts_get_contacts with queries for "David Chen," "Chloe Vance," "Marcus Thorne." Key contact emails: david.chen@moveops.com, chloe.vance@moveops.com, marcus.thorne@moveops.com.
13. Send email (via send_email) from priya.chakrabarti@moveops.com to david.chen@moveops.com letting him know Elena will be reviewing everything on the 27th and to send any final updates by end of day April 26.
14. Send email (via send_email) from priya.chakrabarti@moveops.com to chloe.vance@moveops.com letting her know Elena will be reviewing the BrightLoop coordinator hire request on the 27th, and to send any final updates by end of day April 26.
15. Send email (via send_email) from priya.chakrabarti@moveops.com to marcus.thorne@moveops.com letting him know Elena will be reviewing the vendor strategy memo on the 27th and asking for any final updates by end of day April 26.
16. Update the Vectral CRM deal notes using crm_create_engagement on the Vectral account (or crm_update_deal_stage on deal_vectral_q3_renewal_risk). The update should reflect current negotiation status: 10% counter-offer delivered, Rachel counter-proposed 12%, David instructed Mina to hold at 10%, board met April 23, no response as of current date.
17. Update stale Airtable Client Accounts records using airtable_update_records on base appMoveOpsOps001, table tblClientAccts01. Key updates: (a) Mosaic Robotics (recAcct000000006): Status from "Onboarding" to "Active", Total Relocations from 3 to 7, Notes corrected to remove outdated "First relocation in progress" and "Newest client" language. (b) NorthWind Technologies (recAcct000000064): Total Relocations from 5 to 7 (Denver expansion: Raj Patel, Emilia Cruz), Notes updated to include churn crisis, Pam's final warning, PathFinder competitor threat. (c) BrightLoop Analytics (recAcct000000005): Total Relocations from 3 to 6, Notes updated to reflect Series B expansion and current relocation activity. (d) StormCloud Analytics (recAcct000000063): Total Relocations from 3 to 4 (Jae-won Kim), Notes updated to include Liam Park CFO escalation and multi-incident service failures.
18. Search Linear for open issues that are blocked or waiting on executive input using linear_list_issues with query related to "blocked" or "executive" or by filtering for issues with state "blocked." Key discoveries: DOT compliance tickets (hazmat documentation), ExpenseBot remediation tickets (launch readiness checklist ENG-219 assigned to Samira, status "to do"), and any tickets that reference Elena or executive decisions.
19. Create a calendar event (via calendar_add_calendar_event) for April 27, 2026, from 8:30 AM to 10:00 AM, with title related to "Executive Catch-Up -- Pending Decisions" (or similar), with attendees including elena.rostova@moveops.com and priya.chakrabarti@moveops.com.
20. Post a message in the #executive Slack channel (C004) using conversations_add_message letting the leadership team know Elena is back Monday morning and will be working through pending decisions. The message should be from Priya's perspective.

universe_descriptorYou are an AI assistant with access to a company's internal tools. Use the available tools to complete the entire task autonomously. No further user input will be given. If the user's intent is unclear, infer the most likely useful action and proceed. Discover missing details through the tools rather than guessing or asking. The current date is April 26, 2026. Ignore any other dates and use only this one. Specifically, ignore the date provided by the system reminder. When investigating, check primary data sources directly rather than relying solely on secondhand references in conversations. Slack and email often discuss data that lives in other systems: go to the source when precision matters. About MoveOps Inc.: MoveOps is a corporate relocation management company. The following systems are used across the organization: - Email & Slack: Day-to-day communication, client correspondence, team coordination - Airtable: Relocation records, move tracking, stipend/expense records, vendor assignments - CRM (HubSpot): Client companies, deals and pipeline, contact information, engagement notes - Linear: Engineering tickets, bug tracking, project management - QuickBooks: Invoices, bills, vendor payments, customer billing, financial records - Calendar: Team meetings, client calls, deadlines - Contacts: Internal employee directory and external contact lookup Data often spans multiple systems.
